inlineContent.text: SMIMultimediaCommon provides the protocol-driven API for managing voice sessions within a conversation. Use this framework to create multimedia clients, join and leave voice sessions, manage participants, and process audio data.

abstract.text: The common protocols and types that define the public API surface for multimedia capabilities.
